body: {"rationale":"All 8 criteria met. Title uses imperative verb phrase after command prefix and names the subsystem and change. Description has all four required sections (PROBLEM, ROOT CAUSE with three specific file:line anchors, PROPOSED FIX, NON-SCOPE) plus an explicit PARENT AND DEPS block. AC is numbered 1-11: ACs 5-8 each name a distinct TestWorkFocus* function, AC 9 wires them into a -run filter, AC 10 is the broad go test gate, AC 11 is the lefthook gate — correct final-two-line pattern. Labels carry phase:2, three area: tags, kind:feature, and spec:FEAT-010 cross-ref. Parent ddx-09d7d787 and dep ddx-377ebf92 are explicit. No /tmp paths or chat references; description is fully standalone.","score":8,"suggested_fixes":[],"waivers_applied":[]}

{"base_rev":"a1c31ad0aeebc39c82df412fdf03b5da70877dc1","classification":"regression","decode_warnings":[{"field":"suggested_amendments","warning":"expected array; dropped malformed field","raw_excerpt":"["Scope the fix: the bead asked only for ddx work focus; the agent must have touched execute-bead gate or worktree path logic to cause these regressions — add a NON-SCOPE line explicitly forbidding changes to cmd/agent_execute_bead*.go and internal/server/workers*.go","Add AC: TestExecuteBeadGatePass, TestExecuteBeadGateBlocksLanding, TestExecuteBead_RequiredGatePass_Merges, TestExecuteBead_RequiredGateFail_Preserves, TestExecuteBeadContextBudgetFromConfig, and TestExecuteBeadEmbeddedAgentSt...[truncated]"},{"field":"suggested_followup_beads","warning":"expected array; dropped malformed field","raw_excerpt":"["fix execute-bead gate evaluation regression introduced in attempt 20260508T055407-9d97558e: TestExecuteBeadGatePass and related gate tests show 'skipped' instead of evaluated and 'merged' instead of 'preserved' — identify the out-of-scope change and revert or repair it"]"},{"field":"classification","warning":"unknown classification","raw_excerpt":"regression"},{"field":"recommended_action","warning":"unknown recommended_action","raw_excerpt":"needs_human"}],"detail":"landed locally; push failed: git push origin 9d1c6c9ce21f71812da02ab8dcf6643e8f9bd160:refs/heads/main: ╭────────────────────────────────────╮
